title: Nealjan's Chroma Key Blocks
description: Adds simple one colored blocks that can be used by video editors for chroma keying
body:
Nealjan's Chroma Key Blocks

This is Nealjan's Chroma Key Blocks!

Nealjan's Chroma Key Blocks adds simple one colored emissive blocks that can be used for chroma keying in video editing!

Features

Each block added has an emissive texture to make it look unshaded, so it always has the right color, independent of lighting!

Every blocks texture has perfect 255 RGB values to make it ideal for video and image editing!

Blocks added:

- Green Chroma Block (#00ff00)

- Blue Chroma Block (#0000ff)

- Light Blue Chroma Block (#00ffff)

- Red Chroma Block (#ff0000)

- Magenta Chroma Block (#ff00ff)

- Yellow Chroma Block (#ffff00)

- White Unshaded Block (#ffffff)

- Black Unshaded Block (#000000)
